lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: 67 Speed How to Play
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: 67 Speed is a browser challenge where your camera counts alternating arm pumps. A compact setup and steady rhythm produce cleaner runs.

steps.title: Open 67speed.com and allow camera access
steps.description: Start on the official site and grant camera permission before the countdown. Without permission, the run cannot be tracked correctly.

steps.title: Stand centered with elbows bent
steps.description: Face the camera directly and keep both arms visible. A compact stance helps the tracker detect each alternating pump.

steps.title: Alternate arm pumps for the full round
steps.description: Move both arms up and down alternately as fast as possible while staying controlled from start to finish.

steps.title: Keep motion rhythmic instead of chaotic
steps.description: Clean, repeatable motion often scores better than random movement bursts because tracking stays consistent.

steps.title: Use landscape mode and bright lighting on phones
steps.description: Mobile runs are easier to track when the phone is horizontal and the room light clearly outlines both arms.

steps.title: Use Safari on iPhone for the smoothest session
steps.description: iOS sessions are most stable in Safari. Avoid private tabs if camera permission is blocked.

quickTips: Keep your full upper body inside the frame before tapping Start.
Warm up for 20 to 30 seconds to reduce early fatigue during max-speed rounds.
Use a fixed phone or laptop angle so tracking does not drift mid-run.
Record your best cadence pattern and reuse it in later attempts.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: 67 Speed Explained
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: 67 Speed is built around one simple loop: get in frame, pump your arms as fast as you can, and chase a bigger number. It feels closer to a webcam challenge with leaderboard energy than to a content-heavy game with stages or progression.

items.question: What is 67 Speed?
items.answer: 67 Speed is a free-to-play web-based arm speed challenge that uses your device camera to track motion and score your alternating arm pumps.

items.question: How does one 67 Speed round work?
items.answer: Stand in front of the camera, keep your upper body visible, bend your elbows, and pump your arms up and down alternately for 20 seconds.

items.question: Where can you play 67 Speed?
items.answer: The core version runs instantly in the browser with no download required, and the official site says it works on both desktop and mobile.

items.question: What does a 67 Speed score measure?
items.answer: The game tracks movement in real time and adds to your total as your arms keep moving. Faster, cleaner bursts create bigger numbers and better leaderboard chances.

items.question: Why did 67 Speed go viral?
items.answer: The setup is easy to understand, each run only lasts 20 seconds, and streamer rivalries turned simple attempts into highly watchable clips.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: 67 Speed Tips
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: Most gains in 67 Speed come from setup and readable movement, not from secret mechanics. Good framing, a clear arm path, and the right mobile setup make the challenge feel much less random.

items.question: How should you frame your 67 Speed setup?
items.answer: Give yourself enough space to move and keep your upper body visible before the timer starts. A clean frame is the base layer for every good run.

items.question: What arm motion works best in 67 Speed?
items.answer: Keep your elbows bent and move your arms up and down alternately. Clean alternation is the core motion the challenge is built around.

items.question: Should both hands move in every 67 Speed burst?
items.answer: Yes. Both hands are tracked in real time and every movement counts, so inactive arm motion directly limits score growth.

items.question: What mobile setup improves 67 Speed tracking?
items.answer: Rotate to landscape and fix your lighting before each round. This setup makes fast movement easier for the camera to read.

items.question: Which round format is best for 67 Speed benchmarking?
items.answer: Use 20-second runs when you want direct comparison with viral clips and streamer score races, then use shorter rounds for warmup.

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: 67 Speed Mobile Guide
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: Phone-first players can match strong desktop performance by controlling orientation, distance, and lighting.

sections.name: Use landscape orientation
sections.description: A horizontal frame gives more room for both arms and helps avoid clipping during fast movement.

sections.name: Set phone at chest-to-face height
sections.description: A stable camera height keeps arm motion readable across the entire round.

sections.name: Keep light in front of you
sections.description: Front lighting reduces shadow noise and helps the tracker read alternating motion clearly.

sections.name: Use Safari on iPhone when possible
sections.description: Safari sessions generally provide the most reliable camera permission flow on iOS devices.

growthMilestones: Comparable scores across web and phone

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: 67 Speed Score Not Saving
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: When scores fail to save or counts look low, the fix is usually camera access, framing, or session stability.

priorities.name: Check camera permission status
priorities.description: If camera access is denied or blocked, runs may not count correctly or fail to finalize.

priorities.name: Restart with a fresh browser session
priorities.description: A clean session can remove temporary permission and device-lock conflicts.

priorities.name: Avoid private/incognito mode on iOS
priorities.description: Private browsing can block camera behavior and interfere with score recording.

priorities.name: Reposition for full upper-body visibility
priorities.description: Partial framing can produce missed detections that look like score-saving problems.

priorities.name: Improve room lighting before retrying
priorities.description: Low contrast can reduce tracking quality and lower final counted totals.

priorities.name: Retry on a stable connection
priorities.description: Network instability can interrupt account sync and leaderboard update visibility.

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.title: 67 Speed Privacy and Safety
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: Camera-based games raise immediate trust questions, so understanding 67 Speed privacy basics is important before long sessions.

achievements.title: On-device motion handling
achievements.description: Official guidance states camera processing happens locally on the user device during gameplay.

achievements.title: No raw stream sharing by default
achievements.description: Gameplay focuses on motion detection and score output rather than storing full video recordings.

achievements.title: Permission-based access
achievements.description: Camera access starts only after browser or app permission is granted by the user.

achievements.title: Anonymous play is possible
achievements.description: Players can test runs before deciding whether to create an account for ranking visibility.

achievements.title: Verification is separate
achievements.description: Verified leaderboard status is tied to account and community verification flows.

achievements.title: Public ranking context
achievements.description: Only score outcomes are surfaced in competitive views, not full camera feeds.

achievements.title: Use clear play space
achievements.description: Keep room around your arms clear to avoid collisions during fast alternation.

achievements.title: Warm up before max attempts
achievements.description: A short warmup improves control and reduces strain during high-speed rounds.

achievements.title: Take breaks between runs
achievements.description: Repeated sprint rounds are demanding, so pacing sessions helps maintain form quality.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: 67 Speed Web vs App
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: Web and iOS both support 67 Speed, but session flow and convenience differ depending on your play style.

faqs.question: Is 67 Speed faster to access on web or app?
faqs.answer: Web is fastest for instant play, while the iOS app is convenient for repeat sessions on phone.

faqs.question: Does 67 Speed scoring differ between web and iOS?
faqs.answer: The core challenge is the same, but tracking quality depends on camera angle, lighting, and session stability.

faqs.question: When should I pick the 67 Speed app?
faqs.answer: Use the app when you want a dedicated mobile routine with fewer browser interruptions.

faqs.question: When should I pick 67 Speed web?
faqs.answer: Use web when you want to start instantly on desktop or quickly test setups across devices.

faqs.question: Can I compare 67 Speed runs across both?
faqs.answer: Yes, many players compare web and app attempts to find the setup that produces the most stable tracking.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: 67 Speed 20 Second Challenge
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: The short round timer is the core reason 67 Speed clips are repeatable, competitive, and easy to share.

faqs.question: Why is the 67 Speed 20-second format so effective?
faqs.answer: Twenty seconds is long enough to test endurance and short enough to retry quickly after every attempt.

faqs.question: How should I pace a 67 Speed 20-second run?
faqs.answer: Start controlled, hold consistent tempo through the middle, and push in the final seconds without losing form.

faqs.question: Is the 67 Speed 10-second mode useful?
faqs.answer: Yes, 10-second rounds are effective for warmups and fast technique experiments before full attempts.

faqs.question: What causes drops late in a 67 Speed run?
faqs.answer: Fatigue, widening arm paths, and lighting drift commonly reduce clean detections near the end.

faqs.question: How many 67 Speed attempts should I chain?
faqs.answer: Short focused sets with rest usually outperform nonstop retries because cadence quality stays higher.

lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.intro: 67 Speed runs across desktop and mobile browsers, plus iOS app sessions, when camera access is configured correctly.

faq.title: 67 Speed Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about 67 Speed

questions.question: What is 67 Speed?
questions.answer: 67 Speed is a camera-based challenge game where you alternate arm pumps to chase higher scores in short timed rounds.

questions.question: How do I get better scores in 67 Speed?
questions.answer: Use stable framing, strong front lighting, compact arm motion, and a consistent pace from start to finish.

questions.question: Where can I play 67 Speed?
questions.answer: You can play instantly on 67speed.com, and iPhone users can also use the official iOS app.

questions.question: Does 67 Speed work on mobile?
questions.answer: Yes. Mobile play works best in landscape mode with clear lighting and camera permission enabled.

questions.question: How does 67 Speed privacy work?
questions.answer: Official guidance says camera processing is handled locally on your device during gameplay.

questions.question: How do I join the 67 Speed verified leaderboard?
questions.answer: Create an account and follow the official verification flow linked through @67.speed updates.
